decisions.client_playback: shell out to ffplay/mpv (no model dep)
decisions.transport_sync: server paces 2 streams: chunked-HTTP audio + SSE/NDJSON timestamped subtitles; server is timeline authority
decisions.transcription: VAD-segmented offline; extend chineseasr to expose Result.Segments{Start,End,Text}
decisions.architecture: thin clients + heavy server, multi-client, ASR shared once
decisions.delay: rolling 2-5 min buffer, join at delayed edge, configurable
decisions.ingestion: on-demand ref-counted, single channel 905, network ffmpeg in NEW server code (lib stays offline)
decisions.edge: basic resilience: reconnect w/ backoff, no-speech=no subs, graceful disconnect
decisions.acceptance: auto plumbing tests + recorded manual E2E
